match: 巴拿马 vs 克罗地亚

kepan_official.note: 本人提供并已核对，未改动；票面SP优先，赔率/接口仅作出票前估算（§1）。

snapshots.hash: Group L: England[1,3pt,4-2 v Croatia] / Ghana[2,3pt,1-0 v Panama] / Panama[3,0pt] / Croatia[4,0pt]; remaining: England-Ghana & Panama-Croatia (Jun 23). England 4-2 Croatia at AT&T Stadium Arlington att 70,389 (Kane 12'pen,42'; Bellingham 47'; Rashford 85' | Baturina 36'; Musa 45+5'). Ghana 1-0 Panama at BMO Field Toronto att 42,942 (Yirenkyi 90+5').
snapshots.用途: 小组归属/排名/赛果/进球时间/场地（非竞彩编号）

snapshots.hash: Opta: Panama 62% poss, 12 shots, xG 0.75, 502 successful passes (team WC record); Cordoba 91 passes record; first shot conceded 48'; conceded 94:04 Yirenkyi. Ghana xG 1.25 from 7 shots, 0 first-half shots.
snapshots.用途: 巴拿马首战技术统计（数据事实）

snapshots.hash: Ghana 1-0 Panama, late 95th-min Yirenkyi winner, match described chaotic/charged.
snapshots.用途: 巴拿马首战战报/比赛性质（媒体观点+事实）

snapshots.hash: Croatia XI: Livakovic; Stanisic, Vuskovic, Gvardiol, Sutalo; Modric, Sucic, Pasalic; Baturina, Perisic, Musa. Modric started, conceded pen 12', subbed 58' for Kovacic; 199th cap. Defensive issues: Stones beaten by Sucic; ball over top for Musa; England 3 second-half goals.
snapshots.用途: 克罗地亚首战首发/换人/失球结构（数据事实+媒体定性）

snapshots.hash: Modric under scrutiny (admits careless pen contact); must-win vs Panama Jun 23 Toronto; Dalic wants better protection vs counterattacks + set-piece improvement; fatigue/aging concerns referenced generally.
snapshots.用途: 克罗地亚队情/战意/弱点（媒体观点，区分事实）

snapshots.hash: Panama coach Thomas Christiansen (Danish-born ex-Spain intl, since 2020). Key: Carrasquilla, Fajardo, Puma Rodriguez, Godoy(c,159 caps), Cordoba, Waterman; Russia 2018 veterans Murillo/Davis/Escobar/Mejia.
Croatia coach Zlatko Dalic; Modric (40, AC Milan, 5th WC, 196 caps) captain; Kovacic (Achilles, missed most of season) & Gvardiol (recovered fractured tibia) monitored.
snapshots.用途: 克罗地亚主帅/Modric年龄/伤情监控（媒体+官方人物）

snapshots.hash: FIFA ranking June 2026: Croatia 11th (per Jun-11 batch). Conflicting media (GlobalstatsX Jun-15) lists 18th — ranking口径/批次差异，待FIFA官方页终核. Panama ~33 (media).
snapshots.用途: FIFA排名（赔率/牌面参考，存口径冲突）

snapshots.hash: The Odds API open 早盘已采集（40家，含 Pinnacle/William Hill/Betfair；不含 bet365 与中国竞彩官方 SP）。文件名按 UTC 开赛日 20260623。
snapshots.用途: 赔率信号/庄家视角；live 临场前再采写同文件（§10）

conflicts: FIFA排名口径：ESPN/Bolavip(Jun-11)列克罗地亚第11；GlobalstatsX(Jun-15)列第18。按更接近FIFA官方批次处理，出票前以FIFA官方排名页终核。
克罗地亚首战控球/射门/xG具体数字未在已取来源给出，待Opta/数据商补；巴拿马首战红黄牌具体牌型(Al Jazeera称chaotic)待核。
note: 已完成：小组归属(L组)、双方本届首轮赛果与技术统计(巴拿马较全/克罗地亚定性为主)、主帅、首发、Modric状态、FIFA排名(存口径冲突)、战意(双方生死战)。待出票前补：竞彩HAD是否开售、The Odds API赔率、047临场首发/伤停/红黄牌细节、克罗地亚首战完整技术统计。预测文章不得当事实；区分数据事实/媒体观点/赔率信号/个人推断。
